info.name: Sout-Elyad API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Sout-Elyad Arabic Sign Language Learning Platform.

## Test Accounts (after seeding)
- Admin: admin@sout-elyad.com / password123
- Teacher: teacher@sout-elyad.com / password123
- Teacher2: teacher2@sout-elyad.com / password123
- User: user@sout-elyad.com / password123
- User2: user2@sout-elyad.com / password123

## Setup
1. Import this collection
2. Import the Sout-Elyad.postman_environment.json
3. Run `node dev-data/import-dev-data.js --delete && node dev-data/import-dev-data.js --import`
4. Start server: `npm run dev`
5. Run the flows in order (each folder is a flow)

item.name: 01 - Auth Flow
item.description:
**Flow**: Signup new user -> Login -> Get Me -> Update Me -> Update Password -> Forgot Password -> Logout

Run these requests in order.

exec: // NOTE: Check the server console for the reset URL

item.name: 02 - Admin User Management
item.description:
**Flow**: Admin gets all users -> gets single user -> updates user role -> deletes user

Requires: Admin logged in (run 01 first).

item.name: 03 - Levels & Lessons Flow
item.description:
**Flow**: Teacher creates level -> creates lessons in level -> Learner browses levels -> views level with lessons -> views nested lessons -> views single lesson

Requires: Teacher and User logged in.

item.name: 04 - Quiz System Flow
item.description:
**Flow**: Teacher creates quiz -> adds MCQ, True-False, and AI Practice questions -> Learner views quiz -> submits answers (AI practice scored by mock AI automatically) -> all 3 types count toward 60% pass -> views attempt history

Requires: Lesson created (run 03 first).

item.name: Add Question 3 (AI Practice)
item.description: Adds an AI practice question. This question requires the learner to perform a sign via camera. The mock AI evaluates it automatically during quiz submission.

body.raw:
{
  "questionText": "Practice: Show me the sign for Alif",
  "questionType": "ai-practice",
  "marks": 3,
  "expectedSign": "alif",
  "quizId": "{{quizId}}"
}

exec: // Save question IDs for submitting answers

item.name: Submit Quiz (Learner - Mixed: MCQ + TF + AI)
item.description:
Submits MCQ and True-False answers. For AI practice, the backend looks up the user's saved result from the video upload step (POST /ai-practice/:questionId). All 3 types count toward 60%.

**Important**: Run 'Upload Video & Evaluate Sign' in folder 10 BEFORE this request so the AI result exists.

Total marks: MCQ(2) + TF(1) + AI(3) = 6. Pass = 60% = 3.6 marks.

item.name: 05 - Progress Tracking Flow
item.description:
**Flow**: Learner marks lesson complete -> views own progress -> Teacher views learner's progress

Requires: Lesson exists (run 03 first).

item.name: Mark Same Lesson Again (should fail - duplicate)
06 - Community Flow
item.description:
**Flow**: User creates post -> teacher comments -> user creates own comment -> user2 creates comment -> user1 tries to delete user2's comment (fails 403) -> user1 deletes own comment (success) -> teacher moderates/deletes user2's comment (success) -> likes/unlikes post -> reports post -> teacher reviews

**Tests comment deletion permissions**: Only owner, teacher, or admin can delete comments.

Requires: Users logged in.

item.name: Add Comment on Post (Nested Route)
item.description: **Teacher encourages learner** - Demonstrates that any authenticated role (user/teacher/admin) can comment. Using teacher token here to show cross-role interaction.

item.name: User1 Tries to Delete User2's Comment (should FAIL 403)
Teacher Deletes User2's Comment (Moderation - should SUCCESS)

exec: pm.test('Status 204 No Content (Teacher can moderate)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));

item.name: Like Post Again (for the get post test)
07 - Notifications Flow
item.description:
**Flow**: Teacher creates notification for user -> User views notifications -> checks unread count -> marks as read -> checks count again

Requires: Users logged in.

body.raw:
{
  "type": "lesson",
  "message": "New lesson 'Alif to Ya Review' is now available!",
  "link": "/lessons/{{lessonId}}",
  "userId": "{{userId}}",
  "teacherId": "5c8a1dfa2f8fb814b56fa181"
}

item.name: 08 - Seeded Data Queries
item.description:
**Flow**: Query all seeded data to verify the database seeding script worked correctly.

Requires: Data seeded with `node dev-data/import-dev-data.js --import`.

exec: pm.test('4 questions in Letters quiz', () => pm.expect(res.results).to.eql(4));

item.name: 09 - API Features (Filter, Sort, Paginate)
item.description: **Flow**: Test the APIFeatures utility — filtering, sorting, field limiting, pagination.

item.name: 10 - AI Practice (Video Upload)
item.description:
**Flow**: User opens camera -> records sign -> uploads video to AI endpoint -> gets feedback -> result is saved and used in quiz scoring.

**How to test**: In Postman, select the 'video' field in Body > form-data, change type to 'File', and select any video file.

Requires: Data seeded and user logged in. Run '04 - Quiz System Flow' first to set aiQuestionId.

item.name: Upload Video & Evaluate Sign
item.description:
Upload a video file of the sign. The mock AI returns random accuracy 70-100% and pass/fail (>= 80%). Result is saved to DB and used when submitting the quiz.

**In Postman**: Body > form-data > key: 'video' (type: File) > select a .mp4 file.

item.name: No Video Upload (should fail 400)
item.description: Sending without a video file should fail.

item.name: Get My Practice Results
item.description: Get the user's practice history for this AI question.
